node.text:
Introducing Nike’s first MIND-ALTERING SHOE: the Nike Mind 001.

Scientifically shown to activate the sensory cortex, Mind 001 can help you get out of your head, connect with your surroundings, and stay more present during your pregame routine.

Available January 2026.
Link in bio.

node.text:
Don’t lose your cool.

Introducing Nike Aero-FIT, Nike’s pinnacle expression of cooling technology. Designed for unrivaled air conditioning through extraordinary air flow, Aero-FIT helps keep you cool and dry when the match heats up. 

Launching in 2026 for the world’s biggest stage, and the hottest conditions on record.

node.text:
Built-in climate control.

Inflate for warmth, deflate to cool down with Nike Therma-FIT Air Milano—a new evolution of AIR that puts thermal tuning at your fingertips. In all conditions, and any climate.

See you on the podium in Milan.

Fast forward your stride—and the future of movement.

Introducing Nike Project Amplify, the world’s first powered footwear system designed for running and walking. Built on decades of Nike innovation, Amplify is for all athletes who want to go further, faster.

Release date to be announced.

node.text: It’s worth every wipe out. #JustDoIt

VIRGIL ABLOH: THE CODES — a look inside the vision of a generation-defining creator.

Showcasing pieces from the archives of Virgil Abloh and Nike at the Grand Palais, September 30 - October 9, 2025. The exhibition celebrated Virgil’s relentless creativity and boundless influence.

It’s an honor to continue his legacy with Shannon Abloh and V.A.A.

Forever inspired. Long live Virgil 🤍

node.text: If they underestimate, overdeliver. #JustDoIt

Same thing, better results.

@beatrice.chebet91 does it again—taking home gold in the 5000m and 10000m.

The distance makes no difference. 

@__melissaj19 takes the sprints in Tokyo with gold in the 100m and the 200m.
